taskDefinitions.name: Morning Brief
taskDefinitions.purpose: Daily research and operator summary before interactive work begins.

taskDefinitions.name: Midday Trend Scan
taskDefinitions.purpose: Watch product, community, and market signals for timely follow-up.

taskDefinitions.name: Research To Draft
taskDefinitions.purpose: Convert approved research into human-reviewed drafts.

taskDefinitions.name: Code Implement Review
taskDefinitions.purpose: Run bounded code task intake through implementation, review, and approval.

taskDefinitions.name: Bug Monitor Triage
taskDefinitions.purpose: Turn runtime or product failures into reproducible triage packets.

taskDefinitions.name: End Of Day Review
taskDefinitions.purpose: Summarize run health, blocked items, review backlog, and memory mutations.
